title: arctium minus f. tomentosum
intro: Arctium minus f. tomentosum, also known as woolly burdock, is a variety of the burdock plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of woolly burdock include its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Woolly burdock can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
